ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), $User.Id <> Id , $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User - API Only', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator without SFDC-DF', $Profile.Name <> 'B2BMA Integration User', !CONTAINS($User.Username, 'autoproc') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permission to edit user detail.
